action.reasoning: Observation: Best remains 0.594 (iter16 with replay500/KD0.5-T2/consol5). Recent iters 17-20 dropped to 0.58-0.35-0.09-0.50 with task9 train_acc~0.04/loss~3.0 (random guessing), val~0.07 during tasks then consol recovery to ~0.50; stdout/curves confirm no learning on late tasks; workspace train.py truncated at 'train_loade' (incomplete loop/opt/KD/mem update). Analysis: Root cause is truncated/incomplete train.py - memory update call missing (memory stays small, no growing rehearsal), training loop/KD/opt steps absent after dataset creation leading to underfitting despite good prior runs. Replay+KD+consol+best-val on val.pt proven at 0.594 with balanced task acc (~0.48 early, 0.7+ late). Decision: Fully rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated concise train.py (mem=500/task balanced per-class via meta+torch.where/randperm, update memory AFTER each task training, epochs/task=6, consol=5@1e-4, Adam(5e-4,wd=1e-5), full KD with KLDivLoss on log_softmax( /T ) * T**2 beta=0.5 only if task>0, CosineAnnealingLR(T_max=epochs_per_task) reset per-task, dense logging every 20 steps with train_acc, val_acc+best tracking after EVERY epoch, deepcopy old_model for KD, final best ckpt as {'model_state_dict': best_state}). Keep model.py/predict.py. Expect recover to >0.59, target >0.61 with bugfixes. Run training then submit_eval.
